    Serialized Form

    • Package ntnu.no.fs_v26.exception

      • Exception Class ntnu.no.fs_v26.exception.ResourceConflictException

        class ResourceConflictException extends RuntimeException implements Serializable

      • Exception Class ntnu.no.fs_v26.exception.ResourceNotFoundException

        class ResourceNotFoundException extends RuntimeException implements Serializable

    • Package ntnu.no.fs_v26.model

      • Class ntnu.no.fs_v26.model.User

        class User extends Object implements Serializable

        • Serialized Fields

          • active
            boolean active
            Indicates whether the user account is active.
          • createdAt
            LocalDateTime createdAt
            The date and time when the user was created.
          • email
            String email
            The user's email address, used as the username for authentication.
          • id
            Long id
            Unique identifier for the user.
          • organization
            Organization organization
            The organization the user belongs to.

            This field is ignored during JSON serialization to prevent circular references and unnecessary data exposure.

          • password
            String password
            The user's hashed password.
          • role
            Role role
            The role assigned to the user, used for authorization.
